overview: Several security issues were fixed in MySQL.
description:
Multiple security issues were discovered in MySQL and this update includes
new upstream MySQL versions to fix these issues.

MySQL has been updated to 8.0.44 in Ubuntu 22.04 LTS and Ubuntu 24.04 LTS.
Ubuntu 25.04 and Ubuntu 25.10 have been updated to MySQL 8.4.7.

In addition to security fixes, the updated packages contain bug fixes, new
features, and possibly incompatible changes.

Please see the following for more information:

https://dev.mysql.com/doc/relnotes/mysql/8.0/en/news-8-0-44.html
https://dev.mysql.com/doc/relnotes/mysql/8.4/en/news-8-4-7.html
https://www.oracle.com/security-alerts/cpuoct2025.html

 

 

 

Multiple security issues were discovered in MySQL and this update includes
new upstream MySQL versions to fix these issues.

MySQL has been updated to 8.0.44 in Ubuntu 22.04 LTS and Ubuntu 24.04 LTS.

In addition to security fixes, the updated packages contain bug fixes, new
features, and possibly incompatible changes.

Please see the following for more information:

https://dev.mysql.com/doc/relnotes/mysql/8.0/en/news-8-0-44.html
https://dev.mysql.com/doc/relnotes/mysql/8.4/en/news-8-4-7.html
https://www.oracle.com/security-alerts/cpuoct2025.html
full_text:
Ubuntu Security Notices

USN-7873-1

 

 

 

 

 

 
USN-7873-1: MySQL vulnerabilities

 

 

 

 
Publication date

 

 

 
19 November 2025

 

 

 

 

 
Overview

 

 

 
Several security issues were fixed in MySQL.

 

 

 

 

 
Releases

 

 

 

 25.10

 25.04

 24.04 LTS

22.04 LTS

 

 

 

 

 

 

 Open side navigation
 

 

 
Packages

 

 mysql-8.0 - MySQL database
 

 mysql-8.4 - MySQL database
 

 

 
Details

 

 

Multiple security issues were discovered in MySQL and this update includes
new upstream MySQL versions to fix these issues.

MySQL has been updated to 8.0.44 in Ubuntu 22.04 LTS and Ubuntu 24.04 LTS.
Ubuntu 25.04 and Ubuntu 25.10 have been updated to MySQL 8.4.7.

In addition to security fixes, the updated packages contain bug fixes, new
features, and possibly incompatible changes.

Please see the following for more information:

https://dev.mysql.com/doc/relnotes/mysql/8.0/en/news-8-0-44.html
https://dev.mysql.com/doc/relnotes/mysql/8.4/en/news-8-4-7.html
https://www.oracle.com/security-alerts/cpuoct2025.html

 

 

 

Multiple security issues were discovered in MySQL and this update includes
new upstream MySQL versions to fix these issues.

MySQL has been updated to 8.0.44 in Ubuntu 22.04 LTS and Ubuntu 24.04 LTS.
Ubuntu 25.04 and Ubuntu 25.10 have been updated to MySQL 8.4.7.

In addition to security fixes, the updated packages contain bug fixes, new
features, and possibly incompatible changes.

Please see the following for more information:

https://dev.mysql.com/doc/relnotes/mysql/8.0/en/news-8-0-44.html
https://dev.mysql.com/doc/relnotes/mysql/8.4/en/news-8-4-7.html
https://www.oracle.com/security-alerts/cpuoct2025.html

 

 

 

 
Update instructions

 

 

 

 

This update uses a new upstream release, which includes additional bug
fixes. In general, a standard system update will make all the necessary
changes.

 Learn more about how to get the fixes.
 

 

 

 

 
The problem can be corrected by updating your system to the following package versions:

 

 

 

 

 Ubuntu Release
 Package Version
 

 25.10

questing

 mysql-server – 

8.4.7-0ubuntu0.25.10.2

 

 25.04

plucky

 mysql-server – 

8.4.7-0ubuntu0.25.04.1

 

 24.04

LTS noble

 mysql-server-8.0 – 

8.0.44-0ubuntu0.24.04.1

 

 22.04

LTS jammy

 mysql-server-8.0 – 

8.0.44-0ubuntu0.22.04.1

 

Reduce your security exposure

 

 Ubuntu Pro provides ten-year security coverage to 25,000+ packages in Main and Universe repositories, and it is free for up to five machines.
 

 

 Get Ubuntu Pro
